Official result1-result3 templates were imported and populated with artifact-tool. Visual inspection passed, zero formula-error matches were found, all mapped fields match the ready plan records, and unused Q5 slots are blank.

Nine ready result-contract records and twelve ready artifact-registry records were generated. All registered SHA-256 values match their files; contract validation and gate checks report zero failures and zero warnings.
